name: Caesar Style Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Slowly pour the garlic oil into the egg yolk while whisking continuously.
2. Gradually whisk in the red wine vinegar.
3. Whisk in the remaining ingredients (Dijon mustard, grated parmesan, salt, and pepper).
4. If the dressing is too thick, thin it down with a little water, one teaspoon at a time.
